title: Plan and construct conventional fencing
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Plan and construct conventional fencing demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine fencing requirements

pcs.text: Access property maps and assess fencing requirements according to workplace objectives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access property maps and assess fencing requirements according to workplace objectives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access property maps and assess fencing requirements according to workplace objectives.

pcs.text: Calculate fencing material required for the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate fencing material required for the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate fencing material required for the task.

pcs.text: Prepare fencing plan, giving consideration to siting fences in relation to natural features, land class and proposed use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare fencing plan, giving consideration to siting fences in relation to natural features, land class and proposed use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare fencing plan, giving consideration to siting fences in relation to natural features, land class and proposed use.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Determine fencing requirements

elements.title: Prepare for construction

pcs.text: Check proposed fencing against property maps and work plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check proposed fencing against property maps and work plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check proposed fencing against property maps and work plan.

pcs.text: Identify services, structures and features that may impact on the fencing work, and incorporate into the fencing plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify services, structures and features that may impact on the fencing work, and incorporate into the fencing plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify services, structures and features that may impact on the fencing work, and incorporate into the fencing plan.

pcs.text: Organise and transport tools and equipment to the work site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Organise and transport tools and equipment to the work site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Organise and transport tools and equipment to the work site.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm and arrange labour requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm and arrange labour requirements.

pcs.text: Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential hazards and risks, and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare for construction

elements.title: Construct conventional fence

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.

pcs.text: Mark out and check fence lines against work plan and property maps

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Mark out and check fence lines against work plan and property maps.

pcs.text: Construct fence according to fencing plan specifications and fence design
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Construct fence according to fencing plan specifications and fence design?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Construct fence according to fencing plan specifications and fence design.

pcs.text: Attach and position gates for correct operation and function
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Attach and position gates for correct operation and function?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Attach and position gates for correct operation and function.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Construct conventional fence

elements.title: Complete fencing operations

pcs.text: Clean and tidy work area and dispose of or recycle rubbish and waste material
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and tidy work area and dispose of or recycle rubbish and waste material?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and tidy work area and dispose of or recycle rubbish and waste material.

pcs.text: Transport, clean, maintain and store tools, fencing equipment and PPE according to workplace procedures

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Transport, clean, maintain and store tools, fencing equipment and PPE according to workplace procedures.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report unserviceable tools and equipment according to workplace procedures.
